data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — implicit_assumption): Contract must define interaction between CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN and existing STATUS:pass|fail. Key clarifications needed: (1) STATUS:pass + UNCERTAIN is valid (agent is uncertain about correctness despite task passing), (2) STATUS:fail does not automatically imply UNCERTAIN — they are orthogonal, (3) only UNCERTAIN signals on STATUS:pass tasks count toward the double-failure threshold (STATUS:fail already triggers revert-to-open in Phase 5 Step 9).
